response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to distributed systems and performance-critical code, but lacks clear evidence of direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, or scalable growth measurement infrastructure — key requirements for this role. Their AI-agent work is promising but not tied to growth systems, and their resume mislabels their name as 'Szabo Bogdan', raising red flags about attention to detail.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across languages (TypeScript, D, C++, Java)
Proven track record in building scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., real-time microservices at Dunnhumby)
Active open-source contributor with tooling for testing, telemetry, and GIS data systems
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or guardrails
Resume name mismatch (Aisha Okonkwo vs. Szabo Bogdan) suggests possible misrepresentation or carelessness
Limited evidence of cross-team leadership in growth or measurement platforms at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Strong systems and performance engineering background
